name: Bookings Engine
headline: A bookings and appointment website source pack that sells availability clearly
idealFor: Consultants, photographers, studios, clinics, and appointment-led businesses
description: A premium appointment funnel with service detail blocks, availability framing, and higher-trust checkout or booking calls to action.
deliveryCopy: Includes appointment offer layouts, service cards, and booking-focused CTA sections.
bullets: Service overview, pricing cues, and session framing
Premium appointment funnel layout with proof and outcomes
Works for paid consults, sessions, and retainers

sections.title: Premium service framing
sections.description: The page uses calm hierarchy and strong proof blocks so higher-ticket appointments feel worth booking.

sections.title: Session detail
sections.description: This pack leaves room for service breakdowns, FAQs, and objections without overwhelming the first viewport.

sections.title: Fast customization
sections.description: Swap the media, offer copy, and session types quickly while keeping the conversion structure intact.

media.title: A source pack for appointment-driven offers
media.body: Use it for premium consultations, coaching calls, studio sessions, or any business that needs a better booking page.
